title: STORM TRADING GROUP Large Grosvenor Trough 55cm Terracotta or Black Long Flower Planter For Home, Balconies, Gardens, Greenhouses & Patios (4, Terracotta)
features: GROSVENOR TROUGH PLANTER: These trough planters are lightweight and easy to transport and lift. Perfect for taking your gardening hobby to the next level. They will fit your indoor or outdoor decoration nicely. Fantastic multipurpose plant pot which will sit perfectly in any outdoor environment. They are lovely way of showcasing all your plants and will create a stable home for plants with its durable base.

LONG PLANTERS: These planters will be a fantastic addition to any garden or patio, the rolled tops and earthy coloured planters are perfect for complementing plants, flowers and topiary. Perfect for gardens our planters are great for adding some beauty to your outside areas. These planters are lightweight made from plastic and easy to carry so you can move them around easily. These planters are weather resistant and are a lovely addition to your garden or patio areas.

VERSATILE PLANT POT: The eye-catching multipurpose plastic flower pot can be used indoors or outdoors. This planter is a perfect fit for flowers, herbs, vegetables, small bushes, ferns, ivy, and spider plants which will thrive in this planter. Our flower pots & planters are a great and inexpensive way to add colour and texture to your homes.

SIZE DIMENSIONS: 55cm planter Dimensions (Approx): 550 x 280 x 330mm / 55 x 28 x 33cm approx. Easy to clean and can be used in gardens, patios, balconies and conservatories, with plenty of room for growing and displaying many plants and flowers. Simply select colour and number of planters required from the menu above.
